title: Redesignated from R.S. 22:1026 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.  (§1026 repealed by Acts 2008, No. 504, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.)
doc_html:
§806.  Redesignated from R.S. 22:1026 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.  (§1026 repealed by Acts 2008, No. 504, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.)

NOTE:  Former R.S. 22:806 redesignated as R.S. 22:72 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.
